title: masema dentatum
intro: Masema dentatum, also known as the "Toothache Plant" due to its ability to relieve toothache pain, is a tropical plant native to the Americas. The plant's leaves contain a compound called sesquiterpene, which is responsible for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Masema dentatum include its analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it beneficial for relieving pain and reducing swelling. Herbal preparations of Masema dentatum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including toothaches, headaches, and fever.
